title: amomum fragrans
intro: Amomum fragrans, also known as Kerala cardamom or Malabar cardamom, is a type of spice plant native to the Western Ghats of India and parts of Southeast Asia. It is a perennial herb with fragrant leaves and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and digestive aid. The health benefits of Amomum fragrans include relief from digestive issues, nausea, and vomiting, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, and its essential oil is also extracted for its medicinal and aromatic properties.
